fields.Description:
Description: refer TaxFormTypeEnum. Tax Form Type holds data related to Tax
								Information, values based on
								regional compliance laws. Applicable for IN Region and can be extended
								for other Regions.

fields.Name: TaxFormNum
fields.Description:
Description: Tax Form Num holds data related to Tax Information based on
								Regional compliance laws.This is applicable for IN region and
								can be extended to other regions in future.

fields.Name: TransactionLocationType
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Location of the purchase or sale transaction. The applicable
								values are those exposed through the
								TransactionLocationTypeEnum. This is currently applicable only
								for the FR region.

fields.Name: Tag
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Descripton: List of tags used to identify the transaction.

fields.Name: TxnApprovalInfo
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
                                    Description: Details of the Approval Status for current transaction in QBO workflows.

fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Reference to the
								RecurTemplate which was used to create the Transaction
								InputType: Read

fields.Name: RecurringInfo
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The Recurring Schedule information for the Transaction

fields.Name: ProjectRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Project identifier
								References to the project this transaction
								is associated with

fields.Name: TotalCostAmount
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
                                Description: Project Estimate identifier
                                The amount or equivalent paid or charged for a product/service

fields.Name: HomeTotalCostAmount
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
                                Description: Project Estimate identifier
                                The amount or equivalent paid or charged for a product/service when using multi-currency

fields.Name: VendorRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Specifies the vendor reference for this transaction
								Filterable: QBW

fields.Name: APAccountRef
fields.Description:
Specifies which AP account the bill will be
								credited to. Many/most small businesses have a single AP
								account, so the account is implied. When specified, the account
								must be a Liability account, and further, the sub-type must be
								of type "Payables"
								[b]QuickBooks Notes[/b][br /]
								The AP Account
								should always be specified or a default will be used.

fields.Name: TotalAmt
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: The total amount due, determined by taking the sum of all lines
								associated. This includes all charges, allowances, taxes,
								discounts, etc...
								[b]QuickBooks Notes[/b][br /]
								Non QB-writable.
								Output only field in case of QBO
								Filterable: QBW
								Sortable: QBW

fields.Name: BillEmail
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: The email address to
								which this bill is/was sent. [br/] Non QB-writable.

fields.Name: ReplyEmail
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: The email address to
								which inquiries about the bill may be directed. (Also
								appropriate for paypal payments). [br/] Non QB-writable.

fields.Name: Memo
fields.Description: QBW only. Memo to be visible to Payee

fields.Name: GlobalTaxCalculation
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Indicates the
								GlobalTax model if the model inclusive of tax, exclusive of
								taxes or not applicable

fields.Name: TaxCodeRef
fields.Description:
Represents the TaxCode Reference with respect
								to the purchase[br /]

fields.Name: ReimbursableInfoRef
fields.Description:
Information about the Customer and actual Job
								or Project the expense must be reimbursed for.

fields.Name: DueDate
fields.Description:
The nominal date by which the bill must be
								paid, not including any early-payment discount incentives, or
								late payment penalties.

fields.Name: ExpectedDate
fields.Description:
The date when the delivery of the product is
								expected.

fields.Name: VendorAddr
fields.Description:
Address to which the payment should be sent.
								[b]QuickBooks Notes[/b][br /]
								Non QB-writable.

fields.Name: ShipTo
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Ship to Entity Reference.

fields.Name: ShipAddr
fields.Description:
Address to which the vendor shipped or will
								ship any goods associated with the purchase.

fields.Name: FOB
fields.Description:
"Free On Board", specifies the terms between
								buyer and seller regarding transportation costs; does not have
								any bookkeeping implications.
								Length Restriction:
								QBO: 15
								QBW: 1024

fields.Name: POEmail
fields.Description:
The email address to which this purchase order
								is/was sent.
								Length Restriction:
								QBO: 15
								QBW: 1024

fields.Name: ManuallyClosed
fields.Description:
The entire transaction, or individual items are
								manually closed, i.e. they may not be received.

fields.Name: PurchaseOrderEx
fields.Description:
Internal use only: extension place holder for
								PurchaseOrder

fields.Name: DropShipToEntity
fields.Description: DropShip to Entity Reference

								Description: If AutoDocNumber is true, DocNumber is generated automatically.
								If false or null, the DocNumber is generated based on preference
								of the user.

fields.Name: CustomerRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Reference to a Customer or job.
								Filterable: QBW
								InputType: ReadWrite
								BusinessRules: QBW: CustomerRef is mandatory for some SalesTransactions like
								Invoice

fields.Name: CustomerMemo
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: For an Invoice, this is the user-entered message to the
								customer that does appear in the invoice, and does appear in the
								printed invoice. The maximum length for Invoice Msg is 1000
								characters.[br /]For a Bill, this is the memo of the transaction
								to provide more detail, and does not appear in the printed
								message of the bill. The maximum length for Bill Msg is 4000
								characters.[br /]For a CreditCardCharge, this message appears in
								the printed record; maximum length is 4000 characters.[br /]Not
								supported for BillPayment, JournalEntry or Payment.
								Description: QBW: User-entered message to the customer; this message will be
								visible to end user on their transactions.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: BillAddr
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: Bill-to address
								of the Invoice.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]
								Description: QBW: The physical (postal) address where the bill
								or invoice is sent.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: ShipAddr
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: Shipping address
								of the Invoice.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]
								Description: QBW: Identifies the address where the goods must be
								shipped. [br /]QuickBooks Note: If ShipAddr is not specified,
								and a default ship-to address is specified in QuickBooks for
								this customer, the default ship-to address will be used by
								QuickBooks.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]

fields.Name: FreeFormAddress
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Specifies whether
								shipping address is in free-form or structured-form (city/state etc.)

fields.Name: ShipFromAddr
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: Shipping from address
								of the Invoice.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]
								Description: QBW: Identifies the address where the goods are shipped
								from. For transactions without shipping, it represents the address where the sale took place.

fields.Name: RemitToRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the party
								receiving payment.
								InputType: ReadOnly

fields.Name: ClassRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the Class
								associated with the transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: SalesTermRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the
								SalesTerm associated with the transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: DueDate
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: Date when the payment of the
								transaction is due.
								Description: QBO: Date when the invoice is to
								be paid, not including any early-payment discount incentives, or
								late payment penalties. If the date is not supplied, the current
								date on the server is used.
								Filterable: QBW
								InputType: ReadWrite
								BusinessRules: QBW: Following are the BusinessRules regarding DueDate of
								transaction

fields.Name: SalesRepRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the
								SalesRep associated with the transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PONumber
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Purchase Order number.
								ValidRange: QBW: max=25
								ValidRange: QBO: max=15

fields.Name: FOB
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: "Free On Board", the
								terms between buyer and seller regarding transportation costs;
								does not have any bookkeeping implications.
								Description: "Free On
								Board", the terms between buyer and seller regarding
								transportation costs; does not have any bookkeeping
								implications.
								ValidRange: QBW: max=13
								ValidRange: QBO: max=15

fields.Name: ShipMethodRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the ShipMethod associated with the transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: ShipDate
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Date for delivery of
								goods or services.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: TrackingNum
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Shipping provider's
								tracking number for the delivery of the goods associated with
								the transaction.

fields.Name: GlobalTaxCalculation
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Indicates the
								GlobalTax model if the model inclusive of tax, exclusive of
								taxes or not applicable

fields.Name: TotalAmt
fields.Description:
Product: All
								Description: QBO: Indicates the
								total amount of the transaction. This includes the total of all
								the charges, allowances and taxes. By default, this is
								recalculated based on sub items total and overridden.
								Description: QBW: Indicates the total amount of the transaction.
								This includes the total of all the charges, allowances and
								taxes.[br /]Calculated by QuickBooks business logic; cannot be
								written to QuickBooks.
								Filterable: QBW
								Sortable: QBW
								InputType: QBW: OverrideOnSync

fields.Name: HomeTotalAmt
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: Total amount of
								the transaction in the home currency for multi-currency enabled
								companies. Single currency companies will not have this field.
								Includes the total of all the charges, allowances and taxes.
								Calculated by QuickBooks business logic. Cannot be written to
								QuickBooks.
								InputType: QBW: ReadOnly

fields.Name: ApplyTaxAfterDiscount
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: If false or null,
								calculate the sales tax first, and then apply the discount. If
								true, subtract the discount first and then calculate the sales
								tax.

fields.Name: ShippingTaxIncludedInTotalTax
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: During total tax override (when user specifies TxnTaxDetail.TotalTax),
								if this is set to true, system overrides all taxes including the shipping tax,
								otherwise (if false or null) only non shipping taxes are overridden and original shipping
								tax is added to the total tax.

fields.Name: TemplateRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the
								Template for the invoice form.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PrintStatus
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Printing status of the
								invoice.[br /]
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: EmailStatus
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Email status of the
								invoice.[br /]
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: BillEmail
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Identifies the e-mail
								address where the invoice is sent. At present, you can provide
								only one e-mail address.[br /]If the ToBeEmailed attribute is
								true and the BillEmail attribute contains an e-mail address, the
								user can send an e-mail message to the e-mail address that is
								specified in the BillEmail attribute.[br /]If the BillEmail
								attribute contains an invalid e-mail address, QBO does not send
								the e-mail message to the invalid e-mail address. QBO also does
								not return any error message to indicate that the e-mail address
								is invalid.[br /]The maximum length for BillEmail is 100
								characters.
								Product: QBW
								Description: Identifies the email address
								where the bill or invoice is sent. [br /]UNSUPPORTED FIELD.

fields.Name: BillEmailCc
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Identifies the cc
								e-mail address where the invoice is sent. If the ToBeEmailed
								attribute is true and the BillEmailCc attribute contains an
								e-mail address, the user can send an e-mail message to the
								e-mail address that is specified in the BillEmailCc
								attribute.[br /] If the BillEmailCc attribute contains an
								invalid e-mail address, QBO does not send the e-mail message to
								the invalid cc e-mail address. [br /]The maximum length for
								BillEmailCc is 200 characters.
								Product: QBW
								Description:
								Identifies the cc email address where the bill or invoice is
								sent. [br /]

fields.Name: BillEmailBcc
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Identifies the bcc
								e-mail address where the invoice is sent. If the ToBeEmailed
								attribute is true and the BillEmailBcc attribute contains an
								e-mail address, the user can send an e-mail message to the
								e-mail address that is specified in the BillEmailBcc
								attribute.[br /] If the BillEmailCc attribute contains an
								invalid bcc e-mail address, QBO does not send the e-mail message
								to the invalid bcc e-mail address. [br /]The maximum length for
								BillEmailBcc is 200 characters.
								Product: QBW
								Description:
								Identifies the bcc email address where the bill or invoice is
								sent as bcc. [br /]

fields.Name: ARAccountRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the
								ARAccount (accounts receivable account) associated with the
								transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: Balance
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The balance reflecting
								any payments made against the transaction. Initially this will
								be equal to the TotalAmt.
								Product: QBW
								Description: Indicates the
								unpaid amount of the transaction.
								Filterable: ALL
								Sortable: QBW
								InputType: ReadOnly

fields.Name: HomeBalance
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The balance reflecting
								any payments made against the transaction in home currency.
								Initially this will be equal to the HomeTotalAmt.[br /]Read-only
								field.
								Product: QBW
								Description: Indicates the unpaid amount of
								the transaction in home currency.[br /]Cannot be written to
								QuickBooks.
								Filterable: ALL
								Sortable: QBW

fields.Name: FinanceCharge
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Indicates whether the
								transaction is a finance charge.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PaymentMethodRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Reference to the
								PaymentMethod.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PaymentRefNum
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The reference number
								for the payment received (I.e. Check # for a check, envelope #
								for a cash donation, CreditCardTransactionID for a credit card
								payment)

fields.Name: PaymentType
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Valid values are Cash, Check, CreditCard, or
								Other. No defaults. Cash based expense is not supported by
								QuickBooks Windows.
								NotApplicableTo: Estimate, SalesOrder

fields.Name: DepositToAccountRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: Reference to the
								DepositToAccount entity. If not specified, the Undeposited Funds
								account will be used.
								Description: QBO: Asset account where the payment money is deposited. If you
								do not specify this account, QBO uses the Undeposited Funds
								account. Supported for Payment and SalesReceipt only.
								NotApplicableTo: QBW: Estimate, SalesOrder

fields.Name: DeliveryInfo
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Last delivery info of this transaction.

fields.Name: DiscountRate
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Indicates the discount
								rate that is applied on the transaction as a whole. This will be
								pro-rated through item lines for tax calculation.

fields.Name: DiscountAmt
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Indicates the discount
								amount that is applied on the transaction as a whole. This will
								be pro-rated through item lines for tax calculation.

fields.Name: GovtTxnRefIdentifier
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: this is the reference
								to the NotaFiscal created for the salesTransaction.
								ValidRange:
								QBO: max=30

fields.Name: TaxExemptionRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Reference to the
								TaxExemptionId and TaxExemptionReason for this customer.

fields.Name: CheckPayment
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
									Description Information about a check payment for the
									Invoice.
									NotApplicableTo: Estimate, SalesOrder

fields.Name: CreditCardPayment
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
									Description Information about a credit card payment for the
									Invoice.
									NotApplicableTo: Estimate, SalesOrder

fields.Name: RemainingCredit
fields.Description:
Indicates the total credit amount still
								available to apply towards the payment.
								[b]QuickBooks
								Notes[/b][br /]
								Non QB-writable.

fields.Name: RefundReceiptEx
fields.Description:
Internal use only: extension place holder for
								Refund

fields.Name: ReimburseCharge
fields.Description: QuickBooks Online Transactions entity — ReimburseCharge

fields.Name: Id
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
						Description: Unique Identifier for an Intuit entity (object). [br /]Required for the update operation.
						Required: ALL
						Filterable: ALL

fields.Name: SyncToken
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
						Description: Version number of the entity.  The SyncToken is used to lock the entity for use by one application at a time. As soon as an application modifies an entity, its SyncToken is incremented; another application's request to modify the entity with the same SyncToken will fail. Only the latest version of the entity is maintained by Data Services.  An attempt to modify an entity specifying an older SyncToken will fail. [br /]Required for the update operation.
						Required: ALL

fields.Name: MetaData
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
						Description: Descriptive information about the entity.  The MetaData values are set by Data Services and are read only for all applications. [contains LastUpdatedTime watermark]

fields.Name: CustomField
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
						Description: Custom field (or data extension).
						Filterable: QBW

fields.Name: AttachableRef
fields.Description: Specifies entity name of the attachment from where the attachment was requested

fields.Name: DocNumber
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: Reference number
								for the transaction. If DocNumber is not provided, and the
								Custom Transaction Number is set to "Off", QBO assigns a
								document number using the next-in-sequence algorithm for Sales
								transactions. Otherwise the value will remaing null.
								Alternatively, you can also pass in "AUTO_GENERATE" in this
								field to force QBO to auto-sequence the document number for
								Invoices, Estimates and Sales Receipt.[br /]The maximum length
								for DocNumber is 21 characters. The default value is an empty
								String. Filter support not provided for Payment.
								Description:
								QBW: The primary document number for this transaction. DocNumber
								is exposed to end users.[br /]If it is not provided, QuickBooks
								business logic will assign the document number using the "next
								in sequence" algorithm.[br /]Max. length is 11 characters for
								Payment, Bill, ItemReceipt and VendorCredit. Max. length is 20
								characters for other entities.
								Filterable: QBO
								InputType: ReadWrite
								ValidRange: QBW: max=11
								ValidRange: QBO: max=21

fields.Name: TxnDate
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: The date entered
								by the user when this transaction occurred. [br /]Often, it is
								the date when the transaction is created in the system. [br
								/]For "posting" transactions, this is the posting date that
								affects the financial statements. If the date is not supplied,
								the current date on the server is used.
								Description: QBW: The
								nominal, user entered, date of the transaction. [br /]Often, but
								not required to be, the date the transaction was created in the
								system. [br /]For "posting" transactions, this is the posting
								date that affects financial statements.
								Filterable: ALL
								Sortable:
								ALL
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: DepartmentRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Location of the
								transaction, as defined using location tracking in QuickBooks
								Online.

fields.Name: CurrencyRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Reference to the
								Currency in which all amounts on the associated transaction are
								expressed.[br /]
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: ExchangeRate
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Currency exchange
								rate. Valid only if the company file is set up to use
								Multi-Currency feature. In QuickBooks, exchange rates are always
								recorded as the number of home currency units it takes to equal
								one foreign currency unit. The foreign unit is always 1 and the
								amount of home units that equal that 1 foreign unit is what
								QuickBooks uses as the exchange rate.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PrivateNote
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: User entered,
								organization-private note about the transaction. This note will
								not appear on the transaction records by default.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: TxnStatus
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: The status of the
								transaction. Depending on the transaction type it may have
								different values.[br /]For Sales Transactions acceptable values
								are defined in PaymentStatusEnum. For Estimate, the values
								accepted are defined in EstimateStatusEnum.
								Description: QBO: The
								status of the transaction. Depending on the transaction type it
								may have different values.[br /]For Sales Transactions
								acceptable values are defined in PaymentStatusEnum. For
								Estimate, the values accepted are defined in
								QboEstimateStatusEnum.
								Filterable:QBW

fields.Name: LinkedTxn
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: A linked (related)
								transaction. More than one transaction can be linked.

fields.Name: Line
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: A line item of a
								transaction.
								Product: QBO
								Description: A line item of a
								transaction. QuickBooks Online does not support tax lines in the
								main transaction body, only in the TxnTaxDetail section.

fields.Name: TxnTaxDetail
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Details of taxes
								charged on the transaction as a whole. For US versions of
								QuickBooks, tax rates used in the detail section must not be
								used in any tax line appearing in the main transaction body. For
								international versions of QuickBooks, the TxnTaxDetail should
								provide the details of all taxes (sales or purchase) calculated
								for the transaction based on the tax codes referenced by the
								transaction. This can be calculated by QuickBooks business logic
								or you may supply it when adding a transaction. For US versions
								of QuickBooks you need only supply the tax code for the customer
								and the tax code (in the case of multiple rates) or tax rate
								(for a single rate) to apply for the transaction as a
								whole.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01100_Global_Tax_Model"]Global
								Tax Model[/a].

fields.Name: TxnSource
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Originating source of
								the Transaction. Valid values are defined in TxnSourceEnum:
								QBMobile.

fields.Name: TaxFormType
fields.Description:
Description: refer TaxFormTypeEnum. Tax Form Type holds data related to Tax
								Information, values based on
								regional compliance laws. Applicable for IN Region and can be extended
								for other Regions.

fields.Name: TaxFormNum
fields.Description:
Description: Tax Form Num holds data related to Tax Information based on
								Regional compliance laws.This is applicable for IN region and
								can be extended to other regions in future.

fields.Name: TransactionLocationType
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Location of the purchase or sale transaction. The applicable
								values are those exposed through the
								TransactionLocationTypeEnum. This is currently applicable only
								for the FR region.

fields.Name: Tag
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Descripton: List of tags used to identify the transaction.

fields.Name: TxnApprovalInfo
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
                                    Description: Details of the Approval Status for current transaction in QBO workflows.

fields.Name: RecurDataRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Reference to the
								RecurTemplate which was used to create the Transaction
								InputType: Read

fields.Name: RecurringInfo
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The Recurring Schedule information for the Transaction

fields.Name: ProjectRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Project identifier
								References to the project this transaction
								is associated with

fields.Name: TotalCostAmount
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
                                Description: Project Estimate identifier
                                The amount or equivalent paid or charged for a product/service

fields.Name: HomeTotalCostAmount
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
                                Description: Project Estimate identifier
                                The amount or equivalent paid or charged for a product/service when using multi-currency

fields.Name: CustomerRef
fields.Description: Product: QBO Description: Customer Reference

fields.Name: HasBeenInvoiced
fields.Description:
Product: QBO Description: Indicates whether the Charge
							has been invoiced

fields.Name: Amount
fields.Description: Total amount of the reimburse charge.

fields.Name: HomeTotalAmt
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: Total amount of
								the transaction in the home currency for multi-currency enabled
								companies. Single currency companies will not have this field.
								Includes the total of all the charges, allowances and taxes.
								Calculated by QuickBooks business logic. Cannot be written to
								QuickBooks.
								InputType: QBW: ReadOnly

fields.Name: SalesOrder
fields.Description: QuickBooks Online Transactions entity — SalesOrder

fields.Name: Id
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
						Description: Unique Identifier for an Intuit entity (object). [br /]Required for the update operation.
						Required: ALL
						Filterable: ALL

fields.Name: SyncToken
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
						Description: Version number of the entity.  The SyncToken is used to lock the entity for use by one application at a time. As soon as an application modifies an entity, its SyncToken is incremented; another application's request to modify the entity with the same SyncToken will fail. Only the latest version of the entity is maintained by Data Services.  An attempt to modify an entity specifying an older SyncToken will fail. [br /]Required for the update operation.
						Required: ALL

fields.Name: MetaData
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
						Description: Descriptive information about the entity.  The MetaData values are set by Data Services and are read only for all applications. [contains LastUpdatedTime watermark]

fields.Name: CustomField
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
						Description: Custom field (or data extension).
						Filterable: QBW

fields.Name: AttachableRef
fields.Description: Specifies entity name of the attachment from where the attachment was requested

fields.Name: DocNumber
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: Reference number
								for the transaction. If DocNumber is not provided, and the
								Custom Transaction Number is set to "Off", QBO assigns a
								document number using the next-in-sequence algorithm for Sales
								transactions. Otherwise the value will remaing null.
								Alternatively, you can also pass in "AUTO_GENERATE" in this
								field to force QBO to auto-sequence the document number for
								Invoices, Estimates and Sales Receipt.[br /]The maximum length
								for DocNumber is 21 characters. The default value is an empty
								String. Filter support not provided for Payment.
								Description:
								QBW: The primary document number for this transaction. DocNumber
								is exposed to end users.[br /]If it is not provided, QuickBooks
								business logic will assign the document number using the "next
								in sequence" algorithm.[br /]Max. length is 11 characters for
								Payment, Bill, ItemReceipt and VendorCredit. Max. length is 20
								characters for other entities.
								Filterable: QBO
								InputType: ReadWrite
								ValidRange: QBW: max=11
								ValidRange: QBO: max=21

fields.Name: TxnDate
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: The date entered
								by the user when this transaction occurred. [br /]Often, it is
								the date when the transaction is created in the system. [br
								/]For "posting" transactions, this is the posting date that
								affects the financial statements. If the date is not supplied,
								the current date on the server is used.
								Description: QBW: The
								nominal, user entered, date of the transaction. [br /]Often, but
								not required to be, the date the transaction was created in the
								system. [br /]For "posting" transactions, this is the posting
								date that affects financial statements.
								Filterable: ALL
								Sortable:
								ALL
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: DepartmentRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Location of the
								transaction, as defined using location tracking in QuickBooks
								Online.

fields.Name: CurrencyRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Reference to the
								Currency in which all amounts on the associated transaction are
								expressed.[br /]
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: ExchangeRate
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Currency exchange
								rate. Valid only if the company file is set up to use
								Multi-Currency feature. In QuickBooks, exchange rates are always
								recorded as the number of home currency units it takes to equal
								one foreign currency unit. The foreign unit is always 1 and the
								amount of home units that equal that 1 foreign unit is what
								QuickBooks uses as the exchange rate.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PrivateNote
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: User entered,
								organization-private note about the transaction. This note will
								not appear on the transaction records by default.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: TxnStatus
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: The status of the
								transaction. Depending on the transaction type it may have
								different values.[br /]For Sales Transactions acceptable values
								are defined in PaymentStatusEnum. For Estimate, the values
								accepted are defined in EstimateStatusEnum.
								Description: QBO: The
								status of the transaction. Depending on the transaction type it
								may have different values.[br /]For Sales Transactions
								acceptable values are defined in PaymentStatusEnum. For
								Estimate, the values accepted are defined in
								QboEstimateStatusEnum.
								Filterable:QBW

fields.Name: LinkedTxn
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: A linked (related)
								transaction. More than one transaction can be linked.

fields.Name: Line
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: A line item of a
								transaction.
								Product: QBO
								Description: A line item of a
								transaction. QuickBooks Online does not support tax lines in the
								main transaction body, only in the TxnTaxDetail section.

fields.Name: TxnTaxDetail
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Details of taxes
								charged on the transaction as a whole. For US versions of
								QuickBooks, tax rates used in the detail section must not be
								used in any tax line appearing in the main transaction body. For
								international versions of QuickBooks, the TxnTaxDetail should
								provide the details of all taxes (sales or purchase) calculated
								for the transaction based on the tax codes referenced by the
								transaction. This can be calculated by QuickBooks business logic
								or you may supply it when adding a transaction. For US versions
								of QuickBooks you need only supply the tax code for the customer
								and the tax code (in the case of multiple rates) or tax rate
								(for a single rate) to apply for the transaction as a
								whole.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01100_Global_Tax_Model"]Global
								Tax Model[/a].

fields.Name: TxnSource
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Originating source of
								the Transaction. Valid values are defined in TxnSourceEnum:
								QBMobile.

fields.Name: TaxFormType
fields.Description:
Description: refer TaxFormTypeEnum. Tax Form Type holds data related to Tax
								Information, values based on
								regional compliance laws. Applicable for IN Region and can be extended
								for other Regions.

fields.Name: TaxFormNum
fields.Description:
Description: Tax Form Num holds data related to Tax Information based on
								Regional compliance laws.This is applicable for IN region and
								can be extended to other regions in future.

fields.Name: TransactionLocationType
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Location of the purchase or sale transaction. The applicable
								values are those exposed through the
								TransactionLocationTypeEnum. This is currently applicable only
								for the FR region.

fields.Name: Tag
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Descripton: List of tags used to identify the transaction.

fields.Name: TxnApprovalInfo
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
                                    Description: Details of the Approval Status for current transaction in QBO workflows.

fields.Name: RecurDataRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Reference to the
								RecurTemplate which was used to create the Transaction
								InputType: Read

fields.Name: RecurringInfo
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The Recurring Schedule information for the Transaction

fields.Name: ProjectRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Project identifier
								References to the project this transaction
								is associated with

fields.Name: TotalCostAmount
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
                                Description: Project Estimate identifier
                                The amount or equivalent paid or charged for a product/service

fields.Name: HomeTotalCostAmount
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
                                Description: Project Estimate identifier
                                The amount or equivalent paid or charged for a product/service when using multi-currency

fields.Name: AutoDocNumber
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: If AutoDocNumber is true, DocNumber is generated automatically.
								If false or null, the DocNumber is generated based on preference
								of the user.

fields.Name: CustomerRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Reference to a Customer or job.
								Filterable: QBW
								InputType: ReadWrite
								BusinessRules: QBW: CustomerRef is mandatory for some SalesTransactions like
								Invoice

fields.Name: CustomerMemo
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: For an Invoice, this is the user-entered message to the
								customer that does appear in the invoice, and does appear in the
								printed invoice. The maximum length for Invoice Msg is 1000
								characters.[br /]For a Bill, this is the memo of the transaction
								to provide more detail, and does not appear in the printed
								message of the bill. The maximum length for Bill Msg is 4000
								characters.[br /]For a CreditCardCharge, this message appears in
								the printed record; maximum length is 4000 characters.[br /]Not
								supported for BillPayment, JournalEntry or Payment.
								Description: QBW: User-entered message to the customer; this message will be
								visible to end user on their transactions.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: BillAddr
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: Bill-to address
								of the Invoice.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]
								Description: QBW: The physical (postal) address where the bill
								or invoice is sent.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: ShipAddr
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: Shipping address
								of the Invoice.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]
								Description: QBW: Identifies the address where the goods must be
								shipped. [br /]QuickBooks Note: If ShipAddr is not specified,
								and a default ship-to address is specified in QuickBooks for
								this customer, the default ship-to address will be used by
								QuickBooks.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]

fields.Name: FreeFormAddress
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Specifies whether
								shipping address is in free-form or structured-form (city/state etc.)

fields.Name: ShipFromAddr
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: Shipping from address
								of the Invoice.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]
								Description: QBW: Identifies the address where the goods are shipped
								from. For transactions without shipping, it represents the address where the sale took place.

fields.Name: RemitToRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the party
								receiving payment.
								InputType: ReadOnly

fields.Name: ClassRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the Class
								associated with the transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: SalesTermRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the
								SalesTerm associated with the transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: DueDate
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: Date when the payment of the
								transaction is due.
								Description: QBO: Date when the invoice is to
								be paid, not including any early-payment discount incentives, or
								late payment penalties. If the date is not supplied, the current
								date on the server is used.
								Filterable: QBW
								InputType: ReadWrite
								BusinessRules: QBW: Following are the BusinessRules regarding DueDate of
								transaction

fields.Name: SalesRepRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the
								SalesRep associated with the transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PONumber
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Purchase Order number.
								ValidRange: QBW: max=25
								ValidRange: QBO: max=15

fields.Name: FOB
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: "Free On Board", the
								terms between buyer and seller regarding transportation costs;
								does not have any bookkeeping implications.
								Description: "Free On
								Board", the terms between buyer and seller regarding
								transportation costs; does not have any bookkeeping
								implications.
								ValidRange: QBW: max=13
								ValidRange: QBO: max=15

fields.Name: ShipMethodRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the ShipMethod associated with the transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: ShipDate
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Date for delivery of
								goods or services.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: TrackingNum
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Shipping provider's
								tracking number for the delivery of the goods associated with
								the transaction.

fields.Name: GlobalTaxCalculation
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Indicates the
								GlobalTax model if the model inclusive of tax, exclusive of
								taxes or not applicable

fields.Name: TotalAmt
fields.Description:
Product: All
								Description: QBO: Indicates the
								total amount of the transaction. This includes the total of all
								the charges, allowances and taxes. By default, this is
								recalculated based on sub items total and overridden.
								Description: QBW: Indicates the total amount of the transaction.
								This includes the total of all the charges, allowances and
								taxes.[br /]Calculated by QuickBooks business logic; cannot be
								written to QuickBooks.
								Filterable: QBW
								Sortable: QBW
								InputType: QBW: OverrideOnSync

fields.Name: HomeTotalAmt
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: Total amount of
								the transaction in the home currency for multi-currency enabled
								companies. Single currency companies will not have this field.
								Includes the total of all the charges, allowances and taxes.
								Calculated by QuickBooks business logic. Cannot be written to
								QuickBooks.
								InputType: QBW: ReadOnly

fields.Name: ApplyTaxAfterDiscount
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: If false or null,
								calculate the sales tax first, and then apply the discount. If
								true, subtract the discount first and then calculate the sales
								tax.

fields.Name: ShippingTaxIncludedInTotalTax
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: During total tax override (when user specifies TxnTaxDetail.TotalTax),
								if this is set to true, system overrides all taxes including the shipping tax,
								otherwise (if false or null) only non shipping taxes are overridden and original shipping
								tax is added to the total tax.

fields.Name: TemplateRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the
								Template for the invoice form.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PrintStatus
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Printing status of the
								invoice.[br /]
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: EmailStatus
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Email status of the
								invoice.[br /]
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: BillEmail
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Identifies the e-mail
								address where the invoice is sent. At present, you can provide
								only one e-mail address.[br /]If the ToBeEmailed attribute is
								true and the BillEmail attribute contains an e-mail address, the
								user can send an e-mail message to the e-mail address that is
								specified in the BillEmail attribute.[br /]If the BillEmail
								attribute contains an invalid e-mail address, QBO does not send
								the e-mail message to the invalid e-mail address. QBO also does
								not return any error message to indicate that the e-mail address
								is invalid.[br /]The maximum length for BillEmail is 100
								characters.
								Product: QBW
								Description: Identifies the email address
								where the bill or invoice is sent. [br /]UNSUPPORTED FIELD.

fields.Name: BillEmailCc
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Identifies the cc
								e-mail address where the invoice is sent. If the ToBeEmailed
								attribute is true and the BillEmailCc attribute contains an
								e-mail address, the user can send an e-mail message to the
								e-mail address that is specified in the BillEmailCc
								attribute.[br /] If the BillEmailCc attribute contains an
								invalid e-mail address, QBO does not send the e-mail message to
								the invalid cc e-mail address. [br /]The maximum length for
								BillEmailCc is 200 characters.
								Product: QBW
								Description:
								Identifies the cc email address where the bill or invoice is
								sent. [br /]

fields.Name: BillEmailBcc
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Identifies the bcc
								e-mail address where the invoice is sent. If the ToBeEmailed
								attribute is true and the BillEmailBcc attribute contains an
								e-mail address, the user can send an e-mail message to the
								e-mail address that is specified in the BillEmailBcc
								attribute.[br /] If the BillEmailCc attribute contains an
								invalid bcc e-mail address, QBO does not send the e-mail message
								to the invalid bcc e-mail address. [br /]The maximum length for
								BillEmailBcc is 200 characters.
								Product: QBW
								Description:
								Identifies the bcc email address where the bill or invoice is
								sent as bcc. [br /]

fields.Name: ARAccountRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the
								ARAccount (accounts receivable account) associated with the
								transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: Balance
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The balance reflecting
								any payments made against the transaction. Initially this will
								be equal to the TotalAmt.
								Product: QBW
								Description: Indicates the
								unpaid amount of the transaction.
								Filterable: ALL
								Sortable: QBW
								InputType: ReadOnly

fields.Name: HomeBalance
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The balance reflecting
								any payments made against the transaction in home currency.
								Initially this will be equal to the HomeTotalAmt.[br /]Read-only
								field.
								Product: QBW
								Description: Indicates the unpaid amount of
								the transaction in home currency.[br /]Cannot be written to
								QuickBooks.
								Filterable: ALL
								Sortable: QBW

fields.Name: FinanceCharge
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Indicates whether the
								transaction is a finance charge.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PaymentMethodRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Reference to the
								PaymentMethod.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PaymentRefNum
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The reference number
								for the payment received (I.e. Check # for a check, envelope #
								for a cash donation, CreditCardTransactionID for a credit card
								payment)

fields.Name: PaymentType
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Valid values are Cash, Check, CreditCard, or
								Other. No defaults. Cash based expense is not supported by
								QuickBooks Windows.
								NotApplicableTo: Estimate, SalesOrder

fields.Name: DepositToAccountRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: Reference to the
								DepositToAccount entity. If not specified, the Undeposited Funds
								account will be used.
								Description: QBO: Asset account where the payment money is deposited. If you
								do not specify this account, QBO uses the Undeposited Funds
								account. Supported for Payment and SalesReceipt only.
								NotApplicableTo: QBW: Estimate, SalesOrder

fields.Name: DeliveryInfo
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Last delivery info of this transaction.

fields.Name: DiscountRate
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Indicates the discount
								rate that is applied on the transaction as a whole. This will be
								pro-rated through item lines for tax calculation.

fields.Name: DiscountAmt
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Indicates the discount
								amount that is applied on the transaction as a whole. This will
								be pro-rated through item lines for tax calculation.

fields.Name: GovtTxnRefIdentifier
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: this is the reference
								to the NotaFiscal created for the salesTransaction.
								ValidRange:
								QBO: max=30

fields.Name: TaxExemptionRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Reference to the
								TaxExemptionId and TaxExemptionReason for this customer.

fields.Name: CheckPayment
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
									Description Information about a check payment for the
									Invoice.
									NotApplicableTo: Estimate, SalesOrder

fields.Name: CreditCardPayment
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
									Description Information about a credit card payment for the
									Invoice.
									NotApplicableTo: Estimate, SalesOrder

fields.Name: ManuallyClosed
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: The entire
								transaction, or individual items are maually closed, i.e. not
								invoiced.

fields.Name: SalesOrderEx
fields.Description:
Internal use only: extension place holder for
								SalesOrder

fields.Name: SalesReceipt
fields.Description: QuickBooks Online Transactions entity — SalesReceipt

fields.Name: Id
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
						Description: Unique Identifier for an Intuit entity (object). [br /]Required for the update operation.
						Required: ALL
						Filterable: ALL

fields.Name: SyncToken
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
						Description: Version number of the entity.  The SyncToken is used to lock the entity for use by one application at a time. As soon as an application modifies an entity, its SyncToken is incremented; another application's request to modify the entity with the same SyncToken will fail. Only the latest version of the entity is maintained by Data Services.  An attempt to modify an entity specifying an older SyncToken will fail. [br /]Required for the update operation.
						Required: ALL

fields.Name: MetaData
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
						Description: Descriptive information about the entity.  The MetaData values are set by Data Services and are read only for all applications. [contains LastUpdatedTime watermark]

fields.Name: CustomField
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
						Description: Custom field (or data extension).
						Filterable: QBW

fields.Name: AttachableRef
fields.Description: Specifies entity name of the attachment from where the attachment was requested

fields.Name: DocNumber
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: Reference number
								for the transaction. If DocNumber is not provided, and the
								Custom Transaction Number is set to "Off", QBO assigns a
								document number using the next-in-sequence algorithm for Sales
								transactions. Otherwise the value will remaing null.
								Alternatively, you can also pass in "AUTO_GENERATE" in this
								field to force QBO to auto-sequence the document number for
								Invoices, Estimates and Sales Receipt.[br /]The maximum length
								for DocNumber is 21 characters. The default value is an empty
								String. Filter support not provided for Payment.
								Description:
								QBW: The primary document number for this transaction. DocNumber
								is exposed to end users.[br /]If it is not provided, QuickBooks
								business logic will assign the document number using the "next
								in sequence" algorithm.[br /]Max. length is 11 characters for
								Payment, Bill, ItemReceipt and VendorCredit. Max. length is 20
								characters for other entities.
								Filterable: QBO
								InputType: ReadWrite
								ValidRange: QBW: max=11
								ValidRange: QBO: max=21

fields.Name: TxnDate
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: The date entered
								by the user when this transaction occurred. [br /]Often, it is
								the date when the transaction is created in the system. [br
								/]For "posting" transactions, this is the posting date that
								affects the financial statements. If the date is not supplied,
								the current date on the server is used.
								Description: QBW: The
								nominal, user entered, date of the transaction. [br /]Often, but
								not required to be, the date the transaction was created in the
								system. [br /]For "posting" transactions, this is the posting
								date that affects financial statements.
								Filterable: ALL
								Sortable:
								ALL
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: DepartmentRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Location of the
								transaction, as defined using location tracking in QuickBooks
								Online.

fields.Name: CurrencyRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Reference to the
								Currency in which all amounts on the associated transaction are
								expressed.[br /]
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: ExchangeRate
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Currency exchange
								rate. Valid only if the company file is set up to use
								Multi-Currency feature. In QuickBooks, exchange rates are always
								recorded as the number of home currency units it takes to equal
								one foreign currency unit. The foreign unit is always 1 and the
								amount of home units that equal that 1 foreign unit is what
								QuickBooks uses as the exchange rate.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PrivateNote
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: User entered,
								organization-private note about the transaction. This note will
								not appear on the transaction records by default.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: TxnStatus
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: The status of the
								transaction. Depending on the transaction type it may have
								different values.[br /]For Sales Transactions acceptable values
								are defined in PaymentStatusEnum. For Estimate, the values
								accepted are defined in EstimateStatusEnum.
								Description: QBO: The
								status of the transaction. Depending on the transaction type it
								may have different values.[br /]For Sales Transactions
								acceptable values are defined in PaymentStatusEnum. For
								Estimate, the values accepted are defined in
								QboEstimateStatusEnum.
								Filterable:QBW

fields.Name: LinkedTxn
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: A linked (related)
								transaction. More than one transaction can be linked.

fields.Name: Line
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: A line item of a
								transaction.
								Product: QBO
								Description: A line item of a
								transaction. QuickBooks Online does not support tax lines in the
								main transaction body, only in the TxnTaxDetail section.

fields.Name: TxnTaxDetail
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Details of taxes
								charged on the transaction as a whole. For US versions of
								QuickBooks, tax rates used in the detail section must not be
								used in any tax line appearing in the main transaction body. For
								international versions of QuickBooks, the TxnTaxDetail should
								provide the details of all taxes (sales or purchase) calculated
								for the transaction based on the tax codes referenced by the
								transaction. This can be calculated by QuickBooks business logic
								or you may supply it when adding a transaction. For US versions
								of QuickBooks you need only supply the tax code for the customer
								and the tax code (in the case of multiple rates) or tax rate
								(for a single rate) to apply for the transaction as a
								whole.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01100_Global_Tax_Model"]Global
								Tax Model[/a].

fields.Name: TxnSource
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Originating source of
								the Transaction. Valid values are defined in TxnSourceEnum:
								QBMobile.

fields.Name: TaxFormType
fields.Description:
Description: refer TaxFormTypeEnum. Tax Form Type holds data related to Tax
								Information, values based on
								regional compliance laws. Applicable for IN Region and can be extended
								for other Regions.

fields.Name: TaxFormNum
fields.Description:
Description: Tax Form Num holds data related to Tax Information based on
								Regional compliance laws.This is applicable for IN region and
								can be extended to other regions in future.

fields.Name: TransactionLocationType
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Location of the purchase or sale transaction. The applicable
								values are those exposed through the
								TransactionLocationTypeEnum. This is currently applicable only
								for the FR region.

fields.Name: Tag
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Descripton: List of tags used to identify the transaction.

fields.Name: TxnApprovalInfo
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
                                    Description: Details of the Approval Status for current transaction in QBO workflows.

fields.Name: RecurDataRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Reference to the
								RecurTemplate which was used to create the Transaction
								InputType: Read

fields.Name: RecurringInfo
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The Recurring Schedule information for the Transaction

fields.Name: ProjectRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Project identifier
								References to the project this transaction
								is associated with

fields.Name: TotalCostAmount
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
                                Description: Project Estimate identifier
                                The amount or equivalent paid or charged for a product/service

fields.Name: HomeTotalCostAmount
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
                                Description: Project Estimate identifier
                                The amount or equivalent paid or charged for a product/service when using multi-currency

fields.Name: AutoDocNumber
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: If AutoDocNumber is true, DocNumber is generated automatically.
								If false or null, the DocNumber is generated based on preference
								of the user.

fields.Name: CustomerRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Reference to a Customer or job.
								Filterable: QBW
								InputType: ReadWrite
								BusinessRules: QBW: CustomerRef is mandatory for some SalesTransactions like
								Invoice

fields.Name: CustomerMemo
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: For an Invoice, this is the user-entered message to the
								customer that does appear in the invoice, and does appear in the
								printed invoice. The maximum length for Invoice Msg is 1000
								characters.[br /]For a Bill, this is the memo of the transaction
								to provide more detail, and does not appear in the printed
								message of the bill. The maximum length for Bill Msg is 4000
								characters.[br /]For a CreditCardCharge, this message appears in
								the printed record; maximum length is 4000 characters.[br /]Not
								supported for BillPayment, JournalEntry or Payment.
								Description: QBW: User-entered message to the customer; this message will be
								visible to end user on their transactions.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: BillAddr
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: Bill-to address
								of the Invoice.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]
								Description: QBW: The physical (postal) address where the bill
								or invoice is sent.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: ShipAddr
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: Shipping address
								of the Invoice.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]
								Description: QBW: Identifies the address where the goods must be
								shipped. [br /]QuickBooks Note: If ShipAddr is not specified,
								and a default ship-to address is specified in QuickBooks for
								this customer, the default ship-to address will be used by
								QuickBooks.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]

fields.Name: FreeFormAddress
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Specifies whether
								shipping address is in free-form or structured-form (city/state etc.)

fields.Name: ShipFromAddr
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBO: Shipping from address
								of the Invoice.[br]See [a
								href="http://ipp.developer.intuit.com/0010_Intuit_Partner_Platform/0060_Financial_Management_Services_(v3)/01000_Using_Data_Service_Entities#Addresses"]Addresses[/a]
								Description: QBW: Identifies the address where the goods are shipped
								from. For transactions without shipping, it represents the address where the sale took place.

fields.Name: RemitToRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the party
								receiving payment.
								InputType: ReadOnly

fields.Name: ClassRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the Class
								associated with the transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: SalesTermRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the
								SalesTerm associated with the transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: DueDate
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: Date when the payment of the
								transaction is due.
								Description: QBO: Date when the invoice is to
								be paid, not including any early-payment discount incentives, or
								late payment penalties. If the date is not supplied, the current
								date on the server is used.
								Filterable: QBW
								InputType: ReadWrite
								BusinessRules: QBW: Following are the BusinessRules regarding DueDate of
								transaction

fields.Name: SalesRepRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the
								SalesRep associated with the transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PONumber
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Purchase Order number.
								ValidRange: QBW: max=25
								ValidRange: QBO: max=15

fields.Name: FOB
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: "Free On Board", the
								terms between buyer and seller regarding transportation costs;
								does not have any bookkeeping implications.
								Description: "Free On
								Board", the terms between buyer and seller regarding
								transportation costs; does not have any bookkeeping
								implications.
								ValidRange: QBW: max=13
								ValidRange: QBO: max=15

fields.Name: ShipMethodRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the ShipMethod associated with the transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: ShipDate
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Date for delivery of
								goods or services.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: TrackingNum
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Shipping provider's
								tracking number for the delivery of the goods associated with
								the transaction.

fields.Name: GlobalTaxCalculation
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Indicates the
								GlobalTax model if the model inclusive of tax, exclusive of
								taxes or not applicable

fields.Name: TotalAmt
fields.Description:
Product: All
								Description: QBO: Indicates the
								total amount of the transaction. This includes the total of all
								the charges, allowances and taxes. By default, this is
								recalculated based on sub items total and overridden.
								Description: QBW: Indicates the total amount of the transaction.
								This includes the total of all the charges, allowances and
								taxes.[br /]Calculated by QuickBooks business logic; cannot be
								written to QuickBooks.
								Filterable: QBW
								Sortable: QBW
								InputType: QBW: OverrideOnSync

fields.Name: HomeTotalAmt
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: Total amount of
								the transaction in the home currency for multi-currency enabled
								companies. Single currency companies will not have this field.
								Includes the total of all the charges, allowances and taxes.
								Calculated by QuickBooks business logic. Cannot be written to
								QuickBooks.
								InputType: QBW: ReadOnly

fields.Name: ApplyTaxAfterDiscount
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: If false or null,
								calculate the sales tax first, and then apply the discount. If
								true, subtract the discount first and then calculate the sales
								tax.

fields.Name: ShippingTaxIncludedInTotalTax
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: During total tax override (when user specifies TxnTaxDetail.TotalTax),
								if this is set to true, system overrides all taxes including the shipping tax,
								otherwise (if false or null) only non shipping taxes are overridden and original shipping
								tax is added to the total tax.

fields.Name: TemplateRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the
								Template for the invoice form.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PrintStatus
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Printing status of the
								invoice.[br /]
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: EmailStatus
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Email status of the
								invoice.[br /]
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: BillEmail
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Identifies the e-mail
								address where the invoice is sent. At present, you can provide
								only one e-mail address.[br /]If the ToBeEmailed attribute is
								true and the BillEmail attribute contains an e-mail address, the
								user can send an e-mail message to the e-mail address that is
								specified in the BillEmail attribute.[br /]If the BillEmail
								attribute contains an invalid e-mail address, QBO does not send
								the e-mail message to the invalid e-mail address. QBO also does
								not return any error message to indicate that the e-mail address
								is invalid.[br /]The maximum length for BillEmail is 100
								characters.
								Product: QBW
								Description: Identifies the email address
								where the bill or invoice is sent. [br /]UNSUPPORTED FIELD.

fields.Name: BillEmailCc
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Identifies the cc
								e-mail address where the invoice is sent. If the ToBeEmailed
								attribute is true and the BillEmailCc attribute contains an
								e-mail address, the user can send an e-mail message to the
								e-mail address that is specified in the BillEmailCc
								attribute.[br /] If the BillEmailCc attribute contains an
								invalid e-mail address, QBO does not send the e-mail message to
								the invalid cc e-mail address. [br /]The maximum length for
								BillEmailCc is 200 characters.
								Product: QBW
								Description:
								Identifies the cc email address where the bill or invoice is
								sent. [br /]

fields.Name: BillEmailBcc
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Identifies the bcc
								e-mail address where the invoice is sent. If the ToBeEmailed
								attribute is true and the BillEmailBcc attribute contains an
								e-mail address, the user can send an e-mail message to the
								e-mail address that is specified in the BillEmailBcc
								attribute.[br /] If the BillEmailCc attribute contains an
								invalid bcc e-mail address, QBO does not send the e-mail message
								to the invalid bcc e-mail address. [br /]The maximum length for
								BillEmailBcc is 200 characters.
								Product: QBW
								Description:
								Identifies the bcc email address where the bill or invoice is
								sent as bcc. [br /]

fields.Name: ARAccountRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Reference to the
								ARAccount (accounts receivable account) associated with the
								transaction.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: Balance
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The balance reflecting
								any payments made against the transaction. Initially this will
								be equal to the TotalAmt.
								Product: QBW
								Description: Indicates the
								unpaid amount of the transaction.
								Filterable: ALL
								Sortable: QBW
								InputType: ReadOnly

fields.Name: HomeBalance
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The balance reflecting
								any payments made against the transaction in home currency.
								Initially this will be equal to the HomeTotalAmt.[br /]Read-only
								field.
								Product: QBW
								Description: Indicates the unpaid amount of
								the transaction in home currency.[br /]Cannot be written to
								QuickBooks.
								Filterable: ALL
								Sortable: QBW

fields.Name: FinanceCharge
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Indicates whether the
								transaction is a finance charge.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PaymentMethodRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Reference to the
								PaymentMethod.
								InputType: ReadWrite

fields.Name: PaymentRefNum
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: The reference number
								for the payment received (I.e. Check # for a check, envelope #
								for a cash donation, CreditCardTransactionID for a credit card
								payment)

fields.Name: PaymentType
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Valid values are Cash, Check, CreditCard, or
								Other. No defaults. Cash based expense is not supported by
								QuickBooks Windows.
								NotApplicableTo: Estimate, SalesOrder

fields.Name: DepositToAccountRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: QBW: Reference to the
								DepositToAccount entity. If not specified, the Undeposited Funds
								account will be used.
								Description: QBO: Asset account where the payment money is deposited. If you
								do not specify this account, QBO uses the Undeposited Funds
								account. Supported for Payment and SalesReceipt only.
								NotApplicableTo: QBW: Estimate, SalesOrder

fields.Name: DeliveryInfo
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Last delivery info of this transaction.

fields.Name: DiscountRate
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Indicates the discount
								rate that is applied on the transaction as a whole. This will be
								pro-rated through item lines for tax calculation.

fields.Name: DiscountAmt
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: Indicates the discount
								amount that is applied on the transaction as a whole. This will
								be pro-rated through item lines for tax calculation.

fields.Name: GovtTxnRefIdentifier
fields.Description:
Product: QBO
								Description: this is the reference
								to the NotaFiscal created for the salesTransaction.
								ValidRange:
								QBO: max=30

fields.Name: TaxExemptionRef
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
								Description: Reference to the
								TaxExemptionId and TaxExemptionReason for this customer.

fields.Name: CheckPayment
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
									Description Information about a check payment for the
									Invoice.
									NotApplicableTo: Estimate, SalesOrder

fields.Name: CreditCardPayment
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
									Description Information about a credit card payment for the
									Invoice.
									NotApplicableTo: Estimate, SalesOrder

fields.Name: SalesReceiptEx
fields.Description: Extension entity for SalesReceipt

fields.Name: LessCIS
fields.Description:
Product: All
								Description: QBO: Indicates the
								less cis amount of the transaction, specific to UK region companies

fields.Name: SalesRep
fields.Description: QuickBooks Online NameLists entity — SalesRep

fields.Name: Id
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
						Description: Unique Identifier for an Intuit entity (object). [br /]Required for the update operation.
						Required: ALL
						Filterable: ALL

fields.Name: SyncToken
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
						Description: Version number of the entity.  The SyncToken is used to lock the entity for use by one application at a time. As soon as an application modifies an entity, its SyncToken is incremented; another application's request to modify the entity with the same SyncToken will fail. Only the latest version of the entity is maintained by Data Services.  An attempt to modify an entity specifying an older SyncToken will fail. [br /]Required for the update operation.
						Required: ALL

fields.Name: MetaData
fields.Description:
Product: ALL
						Description: Descriptive information about the entity.  The MetaData values are set by Data Services and are read only for all applications. [contains LastUpdatedTime watermark]

fields.Name: CustomField
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
						Description: Custom field (or data extension).
						Filterable: QBW

fields.Name: AttachableRef
fields.Description: Specifies entity name of the attachment from where the attachment was requested

fields.Name: NameOf
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: The SalesRep type.
								Also, one of the three entity references (either the Name or the
								ID of the Employee, OtherName, or Vendor) is required for the
								Create request.[br /]
								Required: QBW

fields.Name: Active
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: True if active.
								Inactive sales reps may be hidden from display and may not be
								used on financial transactions.
								Filterable: QBW

fields.Name: Initials
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: User recognizable
								initials of the Sales Rep.[br/]Required for the Create
								request.[br/] Max Length: 5 characters.

fields.Name: SalesRepEx
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
								Description: Internal use only:
								extension place holder for SalesRep

fields.Name: EmployeeRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
									Description: Reference to the
									Employee, if that is the SalesRep type. One of the three entity
									references (either the Name or the ID of the Employee,
									OtherName, or Vendor) is required for the Create request.
									Required: QBW

fields.Name: VendorRef
fields.Description:
Product: QBW
									Description: Reference to the
									Vendor, if that is the SalesRep type. One of the three entity
									references (either the Name or the ID of the Employee,
									OtherName, or Vendor) is required for the Create request.
